title: polygala vilcabambae
intro: Polygala vilcabambae, also known as Yang-Yang or Yellowroot, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Polygala vilcabambae include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and steeped in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
